# Self-hosted Data-Plane & SaaS Control-Plane Roadmap

This file mirrors the roadmap issue and provides a simple kanban-style view in the repo for quick reference.

Backlog
- [MinIO object storage for Git LFS, artifacts, and caches](https://github.com/kushin77/self-hosted-runner/issues/518)
- [Harbor for packages & container registry (or integrate GitLab registry)](https://github.com/kushin77/self-hosted-runner/issues/512)
- [Self-hosted Dev Environments (Coder / DevPod integration)](https://github.com/kushin77/self-hosted-runner/issues/511)
- [Self-hosted AI gateway & model infra (Ollama / vLLM / TGI)](https://github.com/kushin77/self-hosted-runner/issues/508)
- [Secrets management integration (HashiCorp Vault or GitLab native)](https://github.com/kushin77/self-hosted-runner/issues/510)
- [Dependency proxy / cache (GitLab Dependency Proxy + MinIO/Nexus)](https://github.com/kushin77/self-hosted-runner/issues/513)
- [Security scanning orchestration (Trivy + Grype)](https://github.com/kushin77/self-hosted-runner/issues/516)
- [Observability & logs (Prometheus, Grafana, Loki / OpenTelemetry)](https://github.com/kushin77/self-hosted-runner/issues/509)
- [Ephemeral preview / test environments (Argo CD + runners or Coder)](https://github.com/kushin77/self-hosted-runner/issues/507)
- [GPU / model-training runners and vLLM support](https://github.com/kushin77/self-hosted-runner/issues/514)
- [Data-plane agent + single Helm/Terraform installer (one-chart)](https://github.com/kushin77/self-hosted-runner/issues/515)
- [Control Plane baseline (UI, Temporal/Argo Workflows, multi-tenant Postgres, billing & global policies)](https://github.com/kushin77/self-hosted-runner/issues/517)

In Progress
